payload.answer: I can help record this family relationship, but I won’t save it without your confirmation.
repair_options: Add a new memory: Nur and Sara are your twin daughters.
If Nur and Sara already exist as separate people in memory, link both as your daughters and note that they are twins.
If one or both names may be misspelled or need punctuation/capitalization changes, clarify the exact names before saving.
